name: mcp-infra-lens
description: Connect to Linux servers over SSH. Collect live metrics, detect anomalies with z-score analysis against recorded baselines, and get plain-English explanations of what is wrong and why.

INFRA_LENS_DB.description: Path to SQLite database for metric history

tools.name: analyze_server
tools.description: Collect metrics from a Linux server over SSH and explain anomalies in plain English

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Take a metric snapshot without analysis

tools.name: record_baseline
tools.description: Record current metrics as a named baseline for accurate anomaly detection

tools.name: compare_to_baseline
tools.description: Compare current state to a saved baseline and explain the differences

tools.name: get_history
tools.description: Return historical CPU, memory, or load data for a host
